posts.author: JasonG (Jason Geldart)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Guys

I would like to suggest adding a Auto focus feature to the search everything text field so that when you open Search everything it will automatically focus the text field so that you can just start typing instead of having to manually go click the text field then start typing.

Just think this will be a nice feature to add and will help out a lot.

Thanks.
Have a nice day.
